name: PushBots
description: PushBots — multi-platform push notifications for iOS, Android, and web with campaign automation and segmentation.

seo.title: PushBots — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: PushBots: PushBots — multi-platform push notifications for iOS, Android, and web with campaign automation and segmentation.

when_to_use: Multi-platform push notifications for iOS and Android apps
Segment-based campaign automation for mobile push
Drip push notification sequences for onboarding flows

pros: Segmentation and automation on an accessible tier
Free plan large enough for prototypes
Setup docs are direct and unfussy
cons: Smaller ecosystem than OneSignal or Braze
review.verdict: Affordable OneSignal alternative for simple push needs; outgrown quickly by teams scaling orchestration.
review.best_for: Indie and SMB apps needing basic cross-platform push on a budget
review.not_for: Growth teams running segmented journeys and in-app messaging

lock_in.reason: SDK integration, subscribers exportable via API
